Prohibited Abbreviations

104 dangerous abbreviations — never use in clinical documentation

Open official PDF ↗
Abbr. Intended Risk Use Instead
ccCubic centimetersMistaken as u (units)Use mL
IU**International unit(s)Mistaken as IV or the number 10Use unit(s)
lLiterLowercase l mistaken as number 1Use L (UPPERCASE)
mlMilliliterMistaken as unitUse mL
MM or MMillionMistaken as thousandUse million
M or KThousandMistaken as millionUse thousand
Ng or ngNanogramMistaken as mg or nasogastricUse nanogram or nanog
U or u**Unit(s)Mistaken as zero, 4, or ccUse unit(s)
µgMicrogramMistaken as mgUse mcg
AD, AS, AURight ear, left ear, each earMistaken as OD, OS, OUUse right ear, left ear, or each ear
INIntranasalMistaken as IM or IVUse NAS or intranasal
ITIntrathecalMistaken as intratrachealUse intrathecal
OD, OS, OURight eye, left eye, each eyeMistaken as AD, AS, AUUse right eye, left eye, or each eye
Per osBy mouth, orallyMistaken as left eye (OS)Use PO, by mouth, or orally
SC, SQ, sq, or sub qSubcutaneous(ly)Mistaken as SL or 5 everyUse SUBQ
HSHalf-strengthMistaken as bedtimeUse half-strength
hsAt bedtimeMistaken as half-strengthUse HS for bedtime
o.d. or ODOnce dailyMistaken as right eye (OD)Use daily
Q.D., QD, q.d., or qd**Every dayMistaken as q.i.d.Use daily
QhsNightly at bedtimeMistaken as qhr (every hour)Use nightly or HS for bedtime
QnNightly or at bedtimeMistaken as qh (every hour)Use nightly or HS for bedtime
Q.O.D., QOD, q.o.d., or qod**Every other dayMistaken as qd or qidUse every other day
q1dDailyMistaken as qidUse daily
q6PM, etc.Every evening at 6 PMMistaken as every 6 hoursUse daily at 6 PM or 6 PM daily
SSRISliding scale regular insulinMistaken as selective-serotonin reuptake inhibitorUse sliding scale (insulin)
SSISliding scale insulinMistaken as Strong Solution of IodineUse sliding scale (insulin)
TIW or tiw3 times a weekMistaken as 3 times a dayUse 3 times weekly
BIW or biw2 times a weekMistaken as 2 times a dayUse 2 times weekly
UDAs directed (ut dictum)Mistaken as unit doseUse as directed
BBABaby boy A (twin)Mistaken as twin BUse mother's last name + gender + identifier
BGBBaby girl B (twin)Mistaken as gender boyUse mother's last name + gender + identifier
D/CDischarge or discontinuePremature discontinuationUse discharge and discontinue or stop
IJInjectionMistaken as IV or intrajugularUse injection
OJOrange juiceMistaken as OD or OSUse orange juice
Period following abbreviationsmg or mLMistaken as number 1Use without terminal period
DORdoravirineMistaken as DovatoUse complete drug names
TAFtenofovir alafenamideMistaken as tenofovir disoproxil fumarateUse complete drug names
TDFtenofovir disoproxil fumarateMistaken as tenofovir alafenamideUse complete drug names
APAPacetaminophenNot recognizedUse complete drug name
ARA AvidarabineMistaken as cytarabineUse complete drug name
AT IIangiotensin IIMistaken as AT IIIUse complete drug names
AT IIIantithrombin IIIMistaken as AT IIUse complete drug names
AZTzidovudine (Retrovir)Mistaken as azithromycin, etc.Use complete drug name
CPZCompazineMistaken as chlorproMAZINEUse complete drug name
DTOdiluted tincture of opiumMistaken as tincture of opiumUse complete drug name
HCThydrocortisoneMistaken as hydroCHLOROthiazideUse complete drug name
HCTZhydroCHLOROthiazideMistaken as hydrocortisoneUse complete drug name
MgSO4**magnesium sulfateMistaken as morphine sulfateUse complete drug name
MS, MSO4**morphine sulfateMistaken as magnesium sulfateUse complete drug name
MTXmethotrexateMistaken as mitoXANTRONEUse complete drug name
Na at start of drug nameSodium bicarbonateMistaken as no bicarbonateUse complete drug name
NoACnovel/new oral anticoagulantMistaken as no anticoagulantUse complete drug name
OXYoxytocinMistaken as oxyCODONE, OxyCONTINUse complete drug name
PCAprocainamideMistaken as patient-controlled analgesiaUse complete drug name
PITPitocin (oxytocin)Mistaken as PitressinUse complete drug name
PNVprenatal vitaminsMistaken as penicillin VKUse complete drug name
PTUpropylthiouracilMistaken as PurinetholUse complete drug name
T3Tylenol with codeine No. 3Mistaken as liothyronineUse complete drug name
TAC or tactriamcinolone or tacrolimusMistaken as tetracaine, Adrenalin, etc.Use complete drug names
TNKTNKaseMistaken as TPAUse complete drug name
TPA or tPAtissue plasminogen activatorMistaken as TNK, TXA, etc.Use complete drug names
TXAtranexamic acidMistaken as TPAUse complete drug name
ZnSO4zinc sulfateMistaken as morphine sulfateUse complete drug name
Nitro dripnitroglycerin infusionMistaken as nitroprusside infusionUse complete drug name
IV vancIntravenous vancomycinMistaken as InvanzUse complete drug name
LevolevofloxacinMistaken as LevophedUse complete drug name
NeoNeo-SynephrineMistaken as neostigmineUse complete drug name
Coined namesMagic mouthwash, banana bag, etc.Mistaken ingredientsUse complete drug/product names
Number embedded in name5-fluorouracil, 6-mercaptopurineMistaken as dose/number of tabletsUse complete names without embedded number
1/2 tabletHalf tabletMistaken as 1 or 2 tabletsUse text (half tablet)
Roman numeralsVMistaken as letter V or 10Use Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3)
Lack of leading zero.5 mgMistaken as 5 mgUse a leading zero (0.5 mg)
Trailing zero1.0 mgMistaken as 10 mgDo not use trailing zeros for whole numbers
Ratio expression1:1,000Mistaken as wrong strengthExpress strength as quantity per total volume
Drug name & dose run togetherpropranolol20 mgMistaken as 120 mgPlace adequate space
Numerical dose & unit run together10mg, 10UnitsMistaken as 100 or 1000Place adequate space
Large doses without commas100000 unitsMistaken as 10,000 or 1,000,000Use commas for 1,000 or above
3 or mDram / MinimMistaken as number 3 or mLUse the metric system
x1Administer onceMistaken as for 1 dayUse explicit words (e.g., for 1 dose)
> and <More than and less thanMistaken as oppositeUse words 'more than' or 'less than'
↑ and ↓Increase and decreaseMistaken as opposite or lettersUse words 'increase' and 'decrease'
/ (slash mark)Separates doses or indicates perMistaken as number 1Use 'per' rather than a slash
@AtMistaken as number 2Use 'at'
&AndMistaken as number 2Use 'and'
+Plus or andMistaken as number 4Use 'plus' or 'and'
°HourMistaken as zeroUse 'hr', 'h', or 'hour'
Ф or ᴓZero, null signMistaken as 4, 6, 8, 9Use '0' or 'zero'
#Pound(s)Mistaken as number signUse metric system (kg or g)
grGrain(s)Mistaken as gramUse metric system
drDram(s)Mistaken as doctorUse metric system
minMinim(s)Mistaken as minutesUse metric system
ozOunce(s)Mistaken as zero or O2Use metric system
tspTeaspoon(s)Mistaken as tablespoonUse metric system
tbsp or TbspTablespoon(s)Mistaken as teaspoonUse metric system
BBreast, brain, or bladderContradictory meaningsUse full words
CCerebral, coronary, or carotidContradictory meaningsUse full words
D or dDay or doseContradictory meaningsUse full words
HHand or hipContradictory meaningsUse full words
IImpaired or improvementContradictory meaningsUse full words
LLiver or lungContradictory meaningsUse full words
NNo or normalContradictory meaningsUse full words
PPancreas, prostate, etc.Contradictory meaningsUse full words
SSpecial or standardContradictory meaningsUse full words
SS or ssSingle strength, sliding scale, etc.Contradictory meaningsUse full words
